app.title: GitPM
auth.heading: Sign in to GitPM
auth.description: Use your GitLab project membership to continue.
locale.label: Language
nav.label: Main navigation
drafts.heading: Working copies
drafts.description: Each working copy has its own Git branch and worktree, so independent changes stay separate.
drafts.idHint: Use a memorable ID for the branch, or generate a safe one.
drafts.cleanupConfirm: Remove working copy {id}? This removes its worktree and branch.
drafts.writerHintUi: External writer lets another tool edit files; GitPM forms become read-only until you switch back.
drafts.writerHintExternal: Switching back to UI writer re-enables GitPM forms after external changes are synchronized.
drafts.closeHint: Closing prevents further edits but keeps this working copy available to reopen.
drafts.changedExternally: The working copy changed outside GitPM. Review and accept its current files before editing.
drafts.externalWarning: External writer mode is active. Editing actions are read-only.
drafts.localWarning: Changes stay in this working copy until commit and push.
worktree.heading: Working tree
worktree.description: Browse every file in the selected working copy. This view is read-only; Git metadata is hidden.
worktree.selectFile: Select a text file in the tree to view its contents.
worktree.symlinkUnavailable: Symbolic-link targets are not opened for security reasons.
worktree.entryUnavailable: This entry type cannot be previewed.
core.heading: Portfolio work
core.portfolioDescription: A summary of active projects, milestones and tasks across the repository.
core.projectsDescription: Create projects and manage the milestones of the selected project.
core.tasksDescription: Select a project, create tasks and keep their status and details up to date.
core.name: Name
core.title: Title
core.assigneesHint: Assignments are used in Team workload.
core.noPeople: No active people. Add people in People and teams first.
core.archiveMilestoneConfirm: Archive {name}? {count} linked tasks will keep this milestone and display it as archived.
core.deleteConfirm: Delete {name} permanently? This action cannot be undone.
people.deleteRestrictedUnknown: Cannot delete {name}: this person is still used elsewhere, but the server did not return the affected items. Refresh the page and try again.
people.deleteRestrictedChanged: Cannot delete {name}: the related items changed while deletion was being confirmed. Refresh the page and try again.
core.selectProject: Select a project to manage its work.
core.readOnly: Core editing is read-only for this working copy.
readOnly.notOpen: Editing is unavailable because this working copy is not open ({state}).
readOnly.externalWriter: Editing is unavailable because external writer mode is active. Switch back to the UI writer after the external tool stops.
readOnly.changedExternally: Files changed outside GitPM. Review the current files, then acknowledge them to continue editing.
core.moveTaskDescription: The task file will move to the target project. The move is blocked if parent or dependency links would become cross-project.
admin.heading: Administration
admin.slugHint: Technical slugs stay fixed; titles, colors, visibility, and order are safe to change.
admin.noServerConfig: Server and OAuth configuration is intentionally not exposed here.
people.notFound: This person was not found or is no longer available.
people.scheduleDescription: Daily task calendar: free working days, occupied days, and overlaps.
people.noScheduledTasks: There are no assigned tasks with start or due dates.
people.tasksDescription: Active assignments grouped by project, with status and planned dates.
people.noProjects: No active projects are linked to this person.
people.noResponsibleProjects: This person is not responsible for any active projects.
people.noParticipatingProjects: There are no other active projects with assigned tasks.
changes.heading: Changes
changes.description: Review the exact Git diff, understand domain changes, and publish the whole working copy.
changes.readOnly: Changes are read-only for this working copy or role.
changes.discardConfirm: Discard every uncommitted change in this working copy?
changes.cleanHint: The working copy matches its latest commit.
changes.publishHeading: Commit, push, and create a merge request
changes.commitAllHint: The commit will include all changed files in this working copy.
changes.commitScope: All {count} changed files will be committed.
changes.localOnly: The commit is local. This repository has no HTTPS remote for push.
changes.gitlabNotConfigured: The commit is local. Configure GitLab OAuth in .gitpm/config.json to push.
changes.loginForPush: Sign in to GitLab to push
changes.alphaLimitations: One repository and one working-copy owner are configured. A commit includes every changed file; merge-request options include a title and description.
history.heading: History
history.description: Inspect the commit graph, files, domain impact, and create a separate working copy for a revert.
history.empty: Select a commit to inspect it.
history.author: Author
history.conflict: The revert working copy has conflicts in {count} files and was opened in external mode.
history.selectFile: Select a file to view its diff
history.noTextDiff: This file has no textual diff.
board.heading: Board
board.description: Move Tasks between status columns and preserve reusable filtered views.
board.readOnly: The Board is read-only for this working copy.
board.savedDescription: Save the current Project, status, and type filters as a Board view.
board.scrollHint: More status columns may be available horizontally.
gantt.heading: Gantt
gantt.description: Read Task dates, hierarchy, milestones, and dependencies without changing repository data.
gantt.empty: No active Tasks with both start and due dates.
gantt.undatedHint: {count} active tasks are hidden because start or due date is missing.
workload.heading: Team workload
workload.description: Compare approximate weekly allocation with calendar-adjusted capacity.
workload.formula: Formula: estimate is split equally between active assignees, then equally across each person's working dates.
workload.capacityFormula: Capacity: weekly capacity is reduced in proportion to holidays in the person's calendar.
workload.empty: No active, dated, estimated, and assigned Tasks are available for calculation.
workload.unavailable: No active assignee with an active calendar
core.taskDetailDescription: Review the task, then edit it only when a change is needed.
core.projectDetailDescription: Project overview, milestones and shortcuts to its working views.
core.allTasksDescription: Choose a project to open its task workspace. Cross-project work is available in Portfolio and Workload.
core.projectListDescription: Open a project to see its overview and milestones.
core.projectNotFound: This project was not found or is archived.
core.noMilestones: No active milestones in this project.
core.taskNotFound: This task was not found or is archived.
core.allTasksHint: Tasks are intentionally scoped to one project.
core.projectTasksHint: Only tasks from the selected project are shown.
core.selectProjectToCreate: Choose a project in the filter to create a new task.
projectPlan.workDescription: Milestones and tasks follow the saved manual order; use the arrows to rearrange them.
projectPlan.emptyStages: No active milestones yet. Create the first milestone to structure the project plan.
projectPlan.unassignedDescription: Active tasks without a milestone or linked to an archived milestone.
projectPlan.archiveConfirm: Archive project {name}? Its milestones and tasks will remain in the repository.
stages.notFound: This milestone was not found or is archived.
stages.tasksDescription: Only active tasks assigned to this milestone are shown.
stages.emptyTasks: No active tasks are assigned to this milestone yet.
comments.heading: Discussion
comments.placeholder: Write a comment… Type @ to mention a person.
comments.draftHint: Will be added to working copy {draft}. Markdown is supported.
comments.readOnly: Comments are read-only in the current working copy.
comments.deleteConfirm: Delete this comment? Published content remains in Git history.
notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.identityMissing: Link the configured Git author email to a Person email to receive mention notifications.
